'''''Star Wars Official Poster Monthly'' 5''' was published in February [[1978]] by [[Paradise Press]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*"The [[C-3PO/Legends|Threepio]] File", by [[Michael Marten|Dr. M. F. Marten]]: an extended profile of the [[Protocol droid/Legends|protocol droid]].
*"[[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]]—[[Star Wars]]' Friendliest Alien", by [[John May]]: an extended profile of the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]].
*"The Power Behind the Throne", by [[Jon Trux]]: an article exploring the relationship between [[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moff]] [[Wilhuff Tarkin/Legends|Tarkin]] and [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]].
